title: Link in Bio + SoundBetter shortlist + hotel platform gestart
summary: Link in Bio live op marlonkjones.com/links. SoundBetter shortlist: 6 producers (top 3: Philip EDM, Versus, Make One). Nieuw project: luxury hotel platform — alleen 5-sterren hotels max 3 jaar oud, wereldwijd, commissie-model.
decisions: Hotel platform project gestart als nieuw businessidee
